subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-03-25
subcodes.first_line: During the last days of our stay in Egypt, we went to Tanta for the repair of the tomb of Haji Abu'l-Qasim
subcodes.first_line_orig: در زمان رومان مشهور بعلم اخلاق بودند ولی حالا مانند یونانیها در نهایت سوء اخلاق مشاهده میشوند
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization
